task_completion.description: Load the PDB structure 1CA2 into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI is open and '1CA2' is visible in the object list on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Identify and display the zinc ion and its coordinating ligands as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL 3D viewer shows the active site zoomed in, with the zinc ion and surrounding coordinating residues (histidines) and water molecule rendered as stick representations.
Dashed lines connecting the zinc ion to the coordinating ligands are visible in the PyMOL viewer, accompanied by numerical distance values (typically between 1.9 and 2.1 Angstroms).

task_completion.description: Label the coordinating residues in the PyMOL viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels identifying the coordinating residues (e.g., His94, His96, His119) are visible next to the stick representations in the PyMOL viewer.
A terminal command (e.g., using 'png' in PyMOL command line) or file explorer showing the file 'ca2_zinc_coordination.png' saved in the '~/PyMOL_Data/images/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write a coordination report containing residue identities, distances, geometry, and total ligand count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'ca2_zinc_report.txt' at '~/PyMOL_Data/'. The text must explicitly mention: residues 94, 96, 119 and water; the measured distances; 'tetrahedral' geometry; and a total of 4 ligands.

integrity.description: The agent used the PyMOL application to visualize and measure the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual PyMOL graphical user interface with the 3D structure loaded, rather than just text-based scripts or web searches.

integrity.description: Distance measurements were actually performed in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer shows native measurement objects (dashed lines with numbers generated by PyMOL's measurement tool), rather than just text labels added manually.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the required files in the specified directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like 'cat', 'echo', or text editor usage) or file manager windows confirm the files were written to the disk at the exact requested paths, not just printed in the agent's thought process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target PDB structure is 1CA2. The zinc ion coordinates to exactly 4 ligands: 3 histidines (His94, His96, His119) and 1 water molecule (HOH 263). The coordination geometry is tetrahedral. The measured Zn-ligand bond distances should be between 1.91 and 2.10 Å (acceptable range 1.5 - 3.0 Å).
